name: Ma-po Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Hot bean paste (use ground red pepper paste if you can't find this)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into 1/2 inch cubes and deep fry in hot oil for 30 seconds. Remove the tofu and drain off all but 3 tablespoons of oil.
2. Reheat the oil and fry the pork well. Add garlic, hot bean paste, soy sauce, salt, soup stock, and tofu to the pan.
3. Cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Mix cornstarch and water in a separate bowl to make a paste. Stir this mixture into the pan to thicken the sauce.
5. Toss in chopped green onion and sesame oil. Transfer the dish to a serving plate.
6. Sprinkle with brown peppercorn powder and serve hot with rice.
Recipe is from: The PEI-MEI Cookbook VOL. 11
